Journal.Title: Journal of the Korean Society of Radiology

Article.ArticleTitle: Prostate MRI Quality Assessment: PI-QUAL and Factors Influencing Image Quality.

Abstract.AbstractText: Since the introduction of Prostate Imaging Reporting and Data System (PI-RADS), prostate MRI has become an essential tool for detecting clinically significant prostate cancer, determining tumor stage, and guiding targeted biopsy. However, variability in image quality across institutions continues to affect diagnostic accuracy. To address this issue, the Prostate Imaging Quality (PI-QUAL) scoring system was developed as a standardized framework for evaluating the quality of prostate MRI. PI-QUAL v1 established the first quality control system for multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) but had limitations, including the inability to assess biparametric MRI (bpMRI) and a strong reliance on biopsy correlation. The updated PI-QUAL v2 simplified technical requirements, incorporated bpMRI assessment, and introduced a reproducible 3-point scale with adjustment rules that balance quality assurance with the diagnostic advantages of mpMRI. Factors influencing image quality include magnetic field strength and susceptibility- and motion-related artifacts. Complementary approaches, such as the Prostate Signal Intensity Homogeneity Score and artificial intelligence-based evaluation tools, have also been proposed. Overall, PI-QUAL v2 enhances reproducibility and broadens clinical applicability, providing a practical framework for ensuring high-quality prostate MRI. Future progress is expected through standardized data collection, structured training, and multidisciplinary collaboration.
Abstract.CopyrightInformation: Copyrights © 2025 The Korean Society of Radiology.

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 전립선 자기공명영상은 Prostate Imaging Reporting and Data System (PI-RADS) 도입 이후 임상적으로 의미 있는 전립선암의 발견, 병기 설정, 표적 생검 유도에 필수 요소로 자리 잡고 있지만, 기관 간 영상 품질의 차이는 진단 정확성을 저하시킬 수 있다. 이러한 문제를 해결하기 위해 전립선 MRI 영상 품질 평가의 표준화된 틀로서 Prostate Imaging Quality (이하 PI-QUAL) 점수 체계가 개발되었다. PI-QUAL v1은 최초의 다중 매개변수 MRI (multiparametric MRI; 이하 mpMRI) 품질 관리 체계를 확립하였으나, 이중 매개변수 MRI (biparametric MRI; 이하 bpMRI)를 평가에 포함하지 못하고 조직검사 결과에 대한 의존성이 크다는 한계가 있었다. 개정된 PI-QUAL v2는 기술적 요건을 단순화하고, bpMRI 평가를 포함하였으며, 재현성이 높은 3점 척도와 점수 조정 규칙을 도입하여 영상 품질 보장과 mpMRI의 진단적 장점을 균형 있게 반영하였다. PI-QUAL v2는 재현성을 높이고 임상 적용 범위를 확장하여, 고품질 전립선 MRI 확보를 위한 실질적 관리 체계를 제공하며, 향후 표준화된 데이터 구축, 체계적 교육, 다학제 협력에 기반한 발전이 기대된다.
OtherAbstract.CopyrightInformation: Copyrights © 2025 The Korean Society of Radiology.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Conflicts of Interest: The authors have no potential conflicts of interest to disclose.
